description: Transient startup splash window: core APIs (boot status event + get_boot_status command), clipboard write for the copy buttons, and the whole-bundle OTA update surface (updater/dialog/process). The OTA flow is driven from Rust, but the splash is the only Tauri-privileged window, so the matching permissions are scoped here. The 'app' window loads the ordinary web UI over http and gets no Tauri APIs.
